scripts.copy-assets: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist', {recursive:true}); fs.cpSync('index.html', 'dist/index.html'); fs.cpSync('images', 'dist/images', {recursive:true, force:true})"
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run copy-assets && concurrently "tsc --watch" "live-server dist --port=3000 --open=index.html --wait=500"
